audio.summary: Carl Lucas contacted the Sleepaway Camp Hotel to report that he had lost the credit card used for his recent stay. The hotel staff checked their lost and found records and found that the card had been discovered by a cleaner in his room. They informed Carl that they would mail the card back to him. As a gesture of goodwill, they offered him a 10% discount on his next stay at the hotel.
